findings.title: Unpinned dependency in requirements.txt
findings.message: Unpinned dependency detected in requirements.txt. Dependencies without exact version pinning (==) may resolve to different versions across environments, including versions with known vulnerabilities.

findings.title: Unsafe yaml.load() call without SafeLoader
findings.message: Unsafe yaml.load() call detected without SafeLoader or FullLoader. The default Loader in older PyYAML versions allows arbitrary Python object deserialization, enabling remote code execution.

findings.title: pip install using non-PyPI package index
findings.message: pip install using a non-PyPI package index detected. Custom or third-party package indexes may serve malicious packages through dependency confusion or typosquatting attacks.
